---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<span class="section-label">Market Commentary & Analysis</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

This blog is where I post thoughts on a broad range of topics that are broadly within my professional interests. I also post research summaries for projects I am working on.

---
